parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
header Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline
footer Copyright © 2020 Red Hat, Inc. Author: Pavel Tisnovsky

participant "Smart\nProxy" as SmartProxy #9999ff
participant "3Scale" as 3Scale

box "Insights operator" #e0ffe0
participant "<$cog>\nControl logic" as ControlLogic
database "IO memory cache" as IOMemoryCache
end box

entity "CRD" as CRD
collections "OCP\nWebConsole" as OCPWebConsole

== Pulling data from Smart Proxy ==

ControlLogic -> 3Scale : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
3Scale -> SmartProxy : Get\nrecommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
SmartProxy -> 3Scale : Recommendations\nfor cluster
3Scale -> ControlLogic : Recommendations\nfor cluster

== Exposing recommendations ==

ControlLogic -> IOMemoryCache : Store\nrecommendations
IOMemoryCache -> CRD : Expose\nrecommendations

== Pulling from OCP WebConsole ==

OCPWebConsole -> CRD : Read\nrecommendations
CRD -> OCPWebConsole : Here are\nrequired data

@enduml
```
